announcements.title: New AI Features Released
announcements.summary: We've added real-time image generation and better prompt suggestions.
announcements.content:
# New AI Tools are here!

We just rolled out...

- **Image Gen v2** — faster and higher quality
- **Smart Prompt Helper** — suggests improvements as you type

Try it now in the editor!

[Learn more in docs](/docs/ai-tools)

announcements.title: Bugfix & Performance Update
announcements.summary: Fixed crashes on large files and improved load times.
announcements.content:
## Improvements in this update

- Resolved rare crash when opening 500+ page documents
- Reduced memory usage by ~30%
- ...
